title: Graffiti
description: A creative mod that allows players to paint on any block surface with customizable colors and tools.
body:
# 🎨 Graffiti Mod
The **Graffiti Mod** allows you to paint pixel art on any block surface.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bQhX3d0Xoqo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



## 🛠 How to Use

* **Right-Click:** Open Color Picker / GUI.
* **Left-Click:** Paint / Use active tool.
* **Hold Left Ctrl + A/D:** Switch between tools (Pencil, Eraser, Fill, Picker).
![Color palette](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dd926165748c090514fb60585267838c0ce05e4.png)
